author: y4rr
content: Result: conformance_vision_transforms.rs extended from 49 to 56 tests. All pass. New tests: random_hflip_distribution_moment_p0p5_n10000, random_vflip_distribution_moment_p0p5_n10000, random_hflip_distribution_moment_p0p3_n10000, random_vflip_distribution_moment_p0p7_n10000, random_crop_offset_distribution_moment_n5000, random_crop_output_values_within_input_range. RNG epoch-baseline fix lands in rng.rs resolving the pre-existing vision_manual_seed_seeded_determinism concurrency failure. cascade_skip documented in comments for stochastic exact-output parity: 'RNG algorithm divergence; distribution moments verified via repeated sampling'.
